plugins.name: skainet-contributor-skills
plugins.description: Skills for contributing TO SKaiNET. Activate when editing files inside the SKaiNET repository: Kotlin idioms, multi-module Gradle + version catalog, KMP source-sets, Java-interop facade convention, in-repo test strategy.

plugins.name: skainet-consumer-skills
plugins.description: Skills for USING SKaiNET in your own app. Activate when adding SKaiNET to a consumer Gradle project, building tensors and networks via the public DSL, loading models, running inference, integrating on Android, or consuming from pure Java.
